name: Minimap
description: A small persistent map view that summarizes nearby terrain, objectives, entities, or navigation context.
design_notes: Minimaps are high-value but high-risk UI: they can support navigation or pull attention away from the world. Decide what appears, how far it reveals, whether it rotates, and how it supports players who cannot rely on memory or environmental landmarks.
design_purpose: Help players maintain local orientation and route awareness.
Show nearby objectives, hazards, allies, or points of interest at a reduced scale.
Support navigation in dense, procedural, or visually complex spaces.
player_fantasy: The player feels spatially oriented and able to plan routes without opening a full map.

parameters.name: minimap_radius_world_units
parameters.description: World radius represented by the minimap.

parameters.name: minimap_rotation_mode
parameters.description: Whether the map rotates with player orientation.

parameters.name: icon_cull_priority
parameters.description: Priority threshold for hiding less important map icons during clutter.

parameters.name: fog_reveal_padding
parameters.description: Extra reveal distance around explored areas.

parameters.name: minimap_pixel_size
parameters.description: Screen size of the minimap panel.

edge_cases: Multi-floor spaces need above/below or floor selection cues.
Procedural maps need stable icon and reveal behavior across seed regeneration.
Too many icons can hide the player arrow or objective marker.
Split-screen and ultrawide layouts need separate safe-area placement.
common_bugs: Rotating minimap text and icons become unreadable because they rotate with terrain.
Fog reveal state updates visually but not in saved map data.
Entity icons continue showing after despawn or stealth state changes.
Map scale differs from waypoint distance labels and confuses navigation.
balancing_notes: Showing enemies and loot increases efficiency but can reduce exploration and surprise.
North-up maps support geographic learning; rotating maps support immediate turn-by-turn navigation.
accessibility_notes: Provide size, opacity, icon filtering, and colorblind-safe icon shapes.
Avoid making minimap reading mandatory when landmarks, compass cues, or objective text could also guide players.

implementation_notes.unity: Build minimap icons from map_entity_id, icon_type, and reveal state rather than scene hierarchy. Project world coordinates into minimap space and cull icons by priority before rendering.
implementation_notes.godot: Maintain a map data model with explored cells, floor_id, and icon records. Control nodes should render from that model while gameplay systems update fog reveal and entity visibility separately.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use a map subsystem to track replicated icon actors, objective markers, and fog-of-war state. UMG should consume filtered icon data rather than scanning all world actors each tick.
implementation_notes.web: Represent minimap state as tiles, reveal masks, and icon records. Apply north-up or player-up transforms in the renderer and enforce icon_cull_priority before drawing.

relationships.reason: Minimaps often need fog-state filtering so hidden enemies, rooms, or objectives are not revealed incorrectly.
Quest markers can project onto the minimap with distance, filtering, and stale-state rules.
Horror visibility limits can be undermined if the minimap reveals too much spatial certainty.

example_games.title: Grand Theft Auto V
example_games.note: Uses a minimap for nearby streets, routes, and activity markers.

example_games.title: Metal Gear Solid
example_games.note: Uses radar-style map information for nearby guards and stealth awareness.

example_games.title: Age of Empires II
example_games.note: Uses a minimap for scouting, terrain, and army positioning.

example_games.title: Grand Theft Auto IV
example_games.note: Uses a minimap/GPS-style route display for city navigation.

example_games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
example_games.note: Uses a minimap/radar for nearby routes, activities, and navigation cues.

example_games.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
example_games.note: Uses minimap routing and nearby objective context during exploration.

example_games.title: Diablo III
example_games.note: Uses map overlays and minimap information for dungeon navigation.

example_games.title: Fortnite
example_games.note: Uses a minimap for safe-zone, teammate, and nearby activity awareness.

example_games.title: Apex Legends
example_games.note: Uses a minimap for ring, squad, and nearby navigation awareness.

example_games.title: World of Warcraft
example_games.note: Uses minimap tracking for nearby locations, quest context, and navigation.
